intro: Manekia obtusa is a plant species commonly known as the "Guanabano" or "Anisacanthus", which belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anxiolytic properties, which can help alleviate stress, anxiety, and muscle pain. The bioactive constituents of Manekia obtusa include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Manekia obtusa is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions, including insomnia, hypertension, and digestive issues.
